mapper.select: SELECT A.TARGET_ID, A.NAME AS AGENT_NAME, B.AGENT_CONNECTED, B.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(A.SEARCH_TIME),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%d') as AGENT_STARTED, B.AGENT_RAM, B.AGENT_CORES, B.AGENT_PLATFORM_COMPATIBILITY FROM PI_TARGETS A LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS B ON A.NAME = B.AGENT_NAME AND A.AP_NO = B.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND A.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND A.AP_NO = #{ap_no} ORDER BY AGENT_NAME
SELECT TARGET_ID, DATE_FORMAT(REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S' ) AS REGDATE FROM PI_TOTAL WHERE TARGET_ID = #{target_id} ORDER BY REGDATE DESC LIMIT 1,1

SELECT DISTINCT A.TARGET_ID, A.NAME AS AGENT_NAME, B.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, (CASE WHEN A.platform = 'Remote Access Only' THEN 1 ELSE B.AGENT_CONNECTED END ) AS AGENT_CONNECTED, A.COMMENTS, A.PLATFORM FROM PI_TARGETS A LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS B ON A.NAME = B.AGENT_NAME WHERE 1=1 AND A.TARGET_USE = 'Y' ORDER BY A.NAME

SELECT B.DAYS, SUM(IFNULL(A.RRN,0)) AS TYPE1, SUM(IFNULL(A.FOREIGNER,0)) AS TYPE2, SUM(IFNULL(A.DRIVER,0)) AS TYPE3, SUM(IFNULL(A.PASSPORT,0)) AS TYPE4, SUM(IFNULL(A.account_num,0)) AS TYPE5, SUM(IFNULL(A.card_num,0)) AS TYPE6, SUM(IFNULL(A.email,0)) AS TYPE7, SUM(IFNULL(A.mobile_phone,0)) AS TYPE8, SUM(total) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX MONTH) , '%Y-%m') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m') = B.DAYS GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT B.DAYS, SUM(IFNULL(A.RRN,0)) AS TYPE1, SUM(IFNULL(A.FOREIGNER,0)) AS TYPE2, SUM(IFNULL(A.PASSPORT,0)) AS TYPE3, SUM(IFNULL(A.DRIVER,0)) AS TYPE4, SUM(IFNULL(A.account_num,0)) AS TYPE5, SUM(IFNULL(A.card_num,0)) AS TYPE6, SUM(IFNULL(A.email,0)) AS TYPE7, SUM(IFNULL(A.mobile_phone,0)) AS TYPE8, SUM(total) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX DAY) , '%Y-%m-%d') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = B.DAYS GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX MONTH) , '%Y-%m') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m') = B.DAYS
AND A.TARGET_ID IN (
#{item}
)
AND A.TARGET_ID = ''
WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX DAY) , '%Y-%m-%d') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = B.DAYS
AND A.TARGET_ID IN (
#{item}
)
AND A.TARGET_ID = ''
WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT #{target_id}, B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX MONTH) , '%Y-%m') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.USER_NO = #{user_no} LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m') = B.DAYS AND A.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND A.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND A.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT #{target_id}, B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX MONTH) , '%Y-%m') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = #{target_id} AND TU.USER_NO = #{user_no} LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_total A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m') = B.DAYS AND A.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND A.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT #{target_id}, B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX DAY) , '%Y-%m-%d') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = B.DAYS AND A.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT #{target_id}, B.DAYS,
SUM(IFNULL(JSON_EXTRACT(A.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')), 0)) TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
SUM(A.TOTAL) AS TOTALS FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - DUMMY.IDX MONTH) , '%Y-%m') DAYS FROM ( SELECT IDX FROM PI_DUMMY WHERE IDX < #{date} ) DUMMY ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TOTAL A ON DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m') = B.DAYS AND A.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY B.DAYS

SELECT topcomp.TARGET_ID, topcomp.REGDATE, target.NAME, agent.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS IP, IFNULL(TYPE1, 0) as TYPE1 FROM PI_TARGETS target LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents agent ON target.NAME = agent.AGENT_NAME LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, REGDATE, ${datatype} AS TYPE1 FROM pi_total WHERE REGDATE = (SELECT MAX(pi_total.REGDATE) FROM pi_total) )topcomp ON target.TARGET_ID = topcomp.TARGET_ID WHERE target.target_use = 'Y' GROUP BY target.TARGET_ID ORDER BY TYPE1 DESC, NAME ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT S.AP_NO, S.TOTAL, S.COMPLETE, S.ERROR, S.SEARCHED, S.WAIT, S.PAUSE, S.SCANCOMP, SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) AS PROGRESS_COMPLETE, IFNULL(TRUNCATE(SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0) AS VALUE, CONCAT(IFNULL(TRUNCATE(SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0), '%') AS PERCENT FROM ( SELECT A.AP_NO AS AP_NO, COUNT(A.NAME) AS TOTAL, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'ERROR' THEN 1 END) AS ERROR, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHING' THEN 1 END) AS SEARCHED, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.SEARCH_TIME = 0 THEN 1 END) AS WAIT, COUNT( CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 AND A.MATCHCNT = 0 OR A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND A.MATCHCNT = 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN 1 END ) AS COMPLETE, COUNT(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(A.SEARCH_STATUS), 'PAUSED') > 0 THEN 1 END) AS PAUSE, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.MATCHCNT != 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 OR A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND A.MATCHCNT != 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN 1 END) AS SCANCOMP, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PI_AGENTS B WHERE B.AGENT_CONNECTED = 0) AS NOTCONNECT FROM (SELECT T.AP_NO, T.NAME, T.SEARCH_STATUS, T.SEARCH_TIME, T.MATCHCNT FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_targets ST ON T.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_group SG ON SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
WHERE 1=1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
# AND SG.TYPE = 0 GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID) A ) S UNION ALL SELECT S.AP_NO, S.TOTAL, S.COMPLETE, S.ERROR, S.SEARCHED, S.WAIT, S.PAUSE, S.SCANCOMP, SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) AS PROGRESS_COMPLETE, IFNULL(TRUNCATE(SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0) AS VALUE, CONCAT(IFNULL(TRUNCATE(SUM(S.COMPLETE + S.SCANCOMP) / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0), '%') AS PERCENT FROM ( SELECT A.AP_NO AS AP_NO, COUNT(A.NAME) AS TOTAL, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'ERROR' THEN 1 END) AS ERROR, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHING' THEN 1 END) AS SEARCHED, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.SEARCH_TIME = 0 THEN 1 END) AS WAIT, COUNT( CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 AND A.MATCHCNT = 0 OR A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND A.MATCHCNT = 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN 1 END ) AS COMPLETE, COUNT(CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(A.SEARCH_STATUS), 'PAUSED') > 0 THEN 1 END) AS PAUSE, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND A.MATCHCNT != 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 OR A.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND A.MATCHCNT != 0 AND A.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN 1 END) AS SCANCOMP, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PI_AGENTS B WHERE B.AGENT_CONNECTED = 0) AS NOTCONNECT FROM (SELECT T.AP_NO, T.NAME, T.SEARCH_STATUS, T.SEARCH_TIME, T.MATCHCNT FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_targets ST ON T.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_group SG ON SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
WHERE 1=1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
# AND SG.TYPE = 0 AND T.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID) A
#AND A.TARGET_USE = 'Y' ) S

SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, DATE_FORMAT(SG.REGDATE, '%Y년 %m월') AS REGDATE, T.NAME AS SERVER, (CASE WHEN T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'ERROR' THEN '오류' WHEN T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHING' THEN '검색중' WHEN T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND T.SEARCH_TIME = 0 THEN '미검색' WHEN T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND T.SEARCH_TIME != 0 AND T.MATCHCNT = 0 OR T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND T.MATCHCNT = 0 AND T.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN '결과없음' WHEN INSTR(UPPER(T.SEARCH_STATUS), 'PAUSED') > 0 THEN '일시정지' WHEN T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'NONE' AND T.MATCHCNT != 0 AND T.SEARCH_TIME != 0 OR T.SEARCH_STATUS = 'SEARCHED' AND T.MATCHCNT != 0 AND T.SEARCH_TIME != 0 THEN '검출' END) AS STATUS, IFNULL(TC.PATH_CNT, 0) AS FILE,
SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = #{datatypesList.type} THEN JSON_EXTRACT(TC.PATTERN_DATA, CONCAT('$[', #{datatypesList.type_cnt}, '].MATCH_CNT')) ELSE 0 END) AS TYPE#{datatypesList.type},
(SELECT COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS OWN, (SELECT ((CASE WHEN DP.PROCESSING_FLAG NOT IN (1,2) THEN COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) ELSE 0 END)) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS FAL, (SELECT ((CASE WHEN DP.PROCESSING_FLAG = 3 THEN COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) ELSE 0 END)) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS LEGAL, (SELECT ((CASE WHEN DP.PROCESSING_FLAG = 5 THEN COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) ELSE 0 END)) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS SYS, (SELECT ((CASE WHEN DP.PROCESSING_FLAG = 1 THEN COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) ELSE 0 END)) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS DEL FROM pi_ap_server AP, PI_CUSTOM_PATTERN CP, pi_targets T LEFT JOIN pi_total TC ON T.TARGET_ID = TC.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TC.AP_NO
AND TC.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_targets ST ON T.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_group SG ON SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ORDER BY FILE DESC

SELECT COUNT(F.PATH) - COUNT(DP.HASH_ID) AS NONEPATH, COUNT(CASE WHEN F.DELDATE != '' THEN 1 END) AS DELPATH, COUNT(CASE WHEN F.OWNER LIKE 'ex_%' THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN DP.PROCESSING_FLAG='5' THEN 1 END) AS EXCEPTION FROM pi_find F LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_data_processing DP ON F.HASH_ID = DP.HASH_ID AND DP.APPROVAL_STATUS='E' WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, FORMAT(SUM(D.PATH_CNT), '##,##0') AS PATH_CNT, FORMAT(SUM(D.COMPLETE), '##,##0') AS COMPLETE, FORMAT(SUM(D.PATH_CNT) - SUM(D.COMPLETE), '##,##0') AS INCOMPLETE, FORMAT(SUM(D.INACCES_CNT), '##,##0') AS INACCES_CNT FROM (SELECT MAX(TC.REGDATE) AS REGDATE, T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, IFNULL(TC.PATH_CNT, 0) AS PATH_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_data_processing DP WHERE TC.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND TC.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO AND DP.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'E') AS COMPLETE, COUNT(I.PATH) AS INACCES_CNT FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_total TC ON T.TARGET_ID = TC.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TC.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_inaccess I ON I.target_id = T.TARGET_ID AND I.AP_NO = T.AP_NO
AND FROM_UNIXTIME(I.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
WHERE 1=1
AND AP.AP_NO = T.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND T.TARGET_ID IN ( SELECT ST.TARGET_ID FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_schedule_group SG, pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.TYPE = 0
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO )
GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO )D LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_total TC ON TC.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND TC.AP_NO = D.AP_NO AND TC.REGDATE = D.REGDATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY D.PATH_CNT DESC

SELECT D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.PLATFORM, D.NAME AS SERVER, D.FILE, D.COUNT FROM (SELECT MAX(TC.REGDATE) AS REGDATE, T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME AS FULL_NAME, T.TARGET_USE, IFNULL(TC.PATH_CNT, 0) AS FILE, IFNULL(TC.TOTAL, 0) AS COUNT, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', 1) AS HOST_NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -2), '.', 1) AS NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -1) AS SERIAL, T.PLATFORM FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT PTC.* FROM pi_total PTC, (SELECT MAX(regdate) AS REGDATE, target_id,ap_no FROM pi_total GROUP BY target_id) DTC WHERE PTC.target_id = DTC.TARGET_ID AND PTC.regdate = DTC.REGDATE AND PTC.ap_no = DTC.AP_NO) TC ON T.TARGET_ID = TC.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TC.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO
AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1
AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND T.TARGET_ID IN ( SELECT ST.TARGET_ID FROM pi_schedule_group SG, pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.TYPE = 0
AND SG.TYPE != 0
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59') GROUP BY ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO )
GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO )D WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY D.FILE DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DPG.idx) AS APPROVAL_CNT, 'NOT_APPROVAL' AS APPROVAL_STATUS FROM pi_data_processing_group DPG LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATA_PROCESSING DP ON DP.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX = DPG.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON DP.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO WHERE DPG.approval_status = '' AND TU.user_no = #{user_no} UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(CHARGE_ID), 'WAIT_APPROVAL' FROM pi_arocessing_user_view AUV WHERE AUV.approval_status = 'W' AND AUV.user_no = #{user_no} UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT G.schedule_group_id) , 'SCHEDULED' FROM pi_schedule_group G, pi_schedule_targets ST, pi_scheduled_location SL LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = SL.target_id AND TU.ap_no = SL.ap_no WHERE G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID AND ST.target_id = SL.target_id AND ST.ap_no = SL.ap_no AND SL.`status` IN ('scanning', 'scheduled') AND TU.user_no = #{user_no}

SELECT COUNT(T.target_id) AS total_cnt, IFNULL(PSL.STATUS, 'notscanned') as search_status, IF(T.platform = 'Remote Access Only', 'DB','SERVER') AS platform FROM pi_targets T
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON T.target_id = TU.target_id AND T.ap_no = TU.ap_no
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT I.target_id, I.ap_no FROM pi_isolated I
WHERE I.regdate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
WHERE I.regdate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
GROUP BY I.target_id, I.ap_no) D ON T.target_id = D.target_id AND T.ap_no = D.ap_no LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SL.target_id, SL.ap_no, SL.updated, SL.`status` FROM pi_scheduled_location SL, (SELECT target_id, ap_no, MAX(updated) AS updated FROM pi_scheduled_location SL
WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(updated) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(updated) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
GROUP BY target_id, ap_no) DSL WHERE SL.target_id = DSL.target_id AND SL.ap_no = DSL.ap_no AND SL.updated = DSL.updated) PSL ON PSL.target_id = D.target_id AND PSL.ap_no = D.ap_no WHERE T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND TU.user_no = #{user_no}
GROUP BY PSL.STATUS, IF(T.platform = 'Remote Access Only', 1,0)

SELECT R.match_locations, R.`match`, CONCAT(R.target_name," [",(R.ap_no+1),"]") AS target_name FROM pi_rawisolated R, (SELECT PR.target_id, PR.ap_no, MAX(report_timestamp) AS report_timestamp FROM pi_rawisolated PR
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = PR.TARGET_ID AND TU.ap_no = PR.AP_NO WHERE TU.user_no = #{user_no}
WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
GROUP BY target_id, ap_no) D WHERE R.target_id = D.target_id AND R.ap_no = D.ap_no AND R.report_timestamp = D.report_timestamp ORDER BY R.MATCH DESC

SELECT R.target_id ,R.ap_no ,R.data_types ,DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(R.report_timestamp), '%Y-%m-%d') AS report_timestamp FROM pi_rawisolated R, (SELECT target_id, ap_no, MAX(report_timestamp) AS report_timestamp FROM pi_rawisolated WHERE path = 'All local files'
AND FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL ${days} MONTH ) AND NOW()
AND FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL ${days} DAY) AND NOW()
AND (target_id, ap_no) in (
(#{targetList.target_id}, #{targetList.ap})
)
GROUP BY target_id, ap_no, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp), '%Y-%m-%d')) D WHERE D.target_id = R.target_id AND D.ap_no = R.ap_no AND D.report_timestamp = R.report_timestamp

SELECT R.target_id ,R.ap_no ,R.data_types ,DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(R.report_timestamp), '%Y-%m') AS report_timestamp FROM pi_rawisolated R, (SELECT target_id, ap_no, MAX(report_timestamp) AS report_timestamp FROM pi_rawisolated WHERE path = 'All local files'
AND FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL ${days} MONTH) AND NOW()
AND FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL ${days} YEAR) AND NOW()
AND (target_id, ap_no) in (
(#{targetList.target_id}, #{targetList.ap})
)
GROUP BY target_id, ap_no, DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(report_timestamp), '%Y-%m')) D WHERE D.target_id = R.target_id AND D.ap_no = R.ap_no AND D.report_timestamp = R.report_timestamp

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT F.hash_id) AS find_path, COUNT(DISTINCT DP.hash_id) AS processing_path, COUNT(DISTINCT I.path) AS inaccess_path FROM pi_find F, pi_targets T
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = T.target_id AND TU.ap_no = T.ap_no
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_data_processing DP ON DP.target_id = T.target_id AND DP.ap_no = T.ap_no AND DP.approval_type = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_inaccess I ON I.target_id= T.target_id AND I.ap_no = T.ap_no WHERE F.deldate IS NULL
AND TU.user_no = #{user_no}
AND F.target_id = T.target_id AND F.ap_no = T.ap_no AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(DP.hash_id) AS approval_file, SUM(IF(DPF.`type` = 0, 1, 0)) AS approval_false FROM pi_data_processing_flag DPF, pi_data_processing DP
LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = DP.target_id AND TU.ap_no = DP.ap_no
WHERE DP.processing_flag = DPF.processing_flag AND DP.approval_type = 1
AND TU.user_no = #{user_no}

SELECT D.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, D.USER_NO, D.STATUS, D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.TYPE, CONCAT(CAST(D.REGDATE AS CHAR),'_', COUNT(D.TARGET_ID), '대') AS RESULT, D.REGDATE FROM (SELECT SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, SG.USER_NO, SG.STATUS, ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, SG.TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(SG.REGDATE, '%Y년%m월') AS REGDATE FROM pi_schedule_group SG, pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
AND SG.TYPE = 0 GROUP BY SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID) D GROUP BY REGDATE

SELECT D.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, D.USER_NO, D.STATUS, D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.TYPE, CONCAT(CAST(D.REGDATE AS CHAR),'_', COUNT(D.TARGET_ID), '대') AS RESULT, D.REGDATE FROM (SELECT SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, SG.USER_NO, SG.STATUS, ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, SG.TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(SG.REGDATE, '%Y년%m월') AS REGDATE FROM pi_schedule_group SG, pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID
AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
AND NOT SG.TYPE = 0 GROUP BY SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID) D GROUP BY REGDATE

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets T, pi_ap_server AP WHERE T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS SERVER_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets T, pi_ap_server AP WHERE T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 0 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS PC_CNT

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RATE DESC) AS NUM, F.TARGET_ID, F.AP_NO, F.NAME, F.SERVICE_CODE, F.SERVICE_NM, F.MAX_PATH_CNT, F.MAX_TOTAL, CONCAT(ROUND(F.MAX_TOTAL / F.MIN_TOTAL * 100) , '%') AS RATE, F.MAX_DATE, F.MIN_PATH_CNT, F.MIN_TOTAL, DATE_FORMAT(F.MIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MIN_DATE, F.COMPLETED, DATE_FORMAT(F.DATE_COMPLETED, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DATE_COMPLETED FROM (SELECT D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.NAME, D.SERVICE_CODE, D.SERVICE_NM, (SELECT TP.PATH_CNT FROM pi_total TP WHERE TP.REGDATE = D.MAX_DATE AND TP.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND TP.AP_NO = D.AP_NO) AS MAX_PATH_CNT, (SELECT TP.TOTAL FROM pi_total TP WHERE TP.REGDATE = D.MAX_DATE AND TP.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND TP.AP_NO = D.AP_NO) AS MAX_TOTAL, DATE_FORMAT(D.MAX_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MAX_DATE, (SELECT TP.PATH_CNT FROM pi_total TP WHERE TP.REGDATE = D.MIN_DATE AND TP.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND TP.AP_NO = D.AP_NO) AS MIN_PATH_CNT, (SELECT TP.TOTAL FROM pi_total TP WHERE TP.REGDATE = D.MIN_DATE AND TP.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND TP.AP_NO = D.AP_NO) AS MIN_TOTAL, DATE_FORMAT(D.MIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MIN_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(SCHEDULE_STATUS) FROM pi_schedules S WHERE D.TARGET_ID = S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID AND SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'completed') AS COMPLETED, (SELECT MAX(REGDATE) FROM pi_schedules S WHERE D.TARGET_ID = S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID AND SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'completed') AS DATE_COMPLETED FROM (SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, TU.SERVICE_CODE, TU.SERVICE_NM, MAX(TC.REGDATE) AS MAX_DATE, MIN(TC.REGDATE) AS MIN_DATE FROM pi_total TC, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO WHERE TC.TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID AND TC.AP_NO = T.AP_NO GROUP BY TARGET_ID, AP_NO) D ) F LIMIT 20

SELECT IFNULL(S.TOTAL, 0) AS TOTAL, IFNULL(S.COMPLETE, 0) AS PROGRESS_COMPLETE, IFNULL(TRUNCATE(S.COMPLETE / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0) AS VALUE, CONCAT(IFNULL(TRUNCATE(S.COMPLETE / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0), '%') AS PERCENT FROM ( SELECT SUM(IF(D.SCHEDULE_STATUS='completed', 1, 0)) AS COMPLETE, COUNT(D.TARGET_ID) AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, ST.REGDATE, S.SCHEDULE_STATUS, ST.STATUS, S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME FROM pi_schedule_targets ST LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_locations L ON L.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND L.LOCATION_ID = ST.LOCATION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedules S ON S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND S.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO AND ST.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND L.PROTOCOL = 'onedrive'
AND ST.TARGET_ID IN ( SELECT ST.TARGET_ID FROM pi_schedule_group SG, pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE SG.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID AND NOT SG.TYPE = 0 AND SG.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate} ,' 23:59:59') GROUP BY ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO )
GROUP BY ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, DATE_FORMAT(ST.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY REGDATE )D )S

SELECT IFNULL(S.TOTAL, 0) AS TOTAL, IFNULL(S.COMPLETE, 0) AS PROGRESS_COMPLETE, IFNULL(TRUNCATE(S.COMPLETE / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0) AS VALUE, CONCAT(IFNULL(TRUNCATE(S.COMPLETE / S.TOTAL * 100, 1), 0.0), '%') AS PERCENT FROM ( SELECT SUM(IF(D.SCHEDULE_STATUS='completed', 1, 0)) AS COMPLETE, COUNT(D.TARGET_ID) AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, ST.REGDATE, S.SCHEDULE_STATUS, ST.STATUS, S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_NAME FROM pi_schedule_targets ST LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_locations L ON L.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND L.LOCATION_ID = ST.LOCATION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedules S ON S.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND S.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO AND ST.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND L.PROTOCOL = 'onedrive'
AND ST.TARGET_ID IN ( #{item} )
AND DATE_FORMAT(ST.REGDATE, '%Y년 %m월') = #{date}
GROUP BY ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, DATE_FORMAT(ST.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY REGDATE )D )S
SELECT NOTICE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, DATE_FORMAT(REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS REGDATE FROM PI_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ALERT = 1 ORDER BY NOTICE_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT TARGET_ID FROM PI_TARGET_USER TU WHERE TU.USER_NO = #{user_no} UNION ALL SELECT TARGET_ID FROM pi_target_service_user TU WHERE INSA_CODE IN( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT G.INSA_CODE AS INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE G.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code} UNION ALL SELECT G1.INSA_CODE, G1.TEAM_NAME, G1.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G1, CTE WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = G1.UP_IDX AND G1.UP_IDX != G1.INSA_CODE ) SELECT CTE.INSA_CODE FROM CTE )
